title: 34 Inch Foil Number Balloons 0-9 – Blue, Rose Gold, Pink & Silver Helium Number Balloons for Birthday Party Decorations, Happy Anniversary or Baby Shower Balloon Decor, New Year (SILVER, Number 8)
features: 34" Large Foil Number Balloons for Any Occasion: Make your birthday or anniversary extra special with premium 34-inch number balloons. Perfect for milestone party decorations, weddings, or baby showers.

Premium Quality Foil Material – Strong & Reusable: Crafted from durable mylar foil, these helium balloons are non-toxic, lightweight, and long-lasting. The metallic shine creates a stunning, photo-ready backdrop.
Easy Inflation with Air or Helium: Each number balloon features a self-sealing valve for simple inflation and deflation. Use helium to float or air for wall, arch, or table decorations.
Reusable & Eco-Friendly Party Décor: Simply release the air after your party and store the balloon flat for future celebrations. Designed to maintain shape and shine for multiple uses.
Available in 4 Stylish Colours: Choose from Blue, Rose Gold, Pink, or Silver to match your theme. Perfect for happy birthday decorations, anniversaries, and festive party events.
description: Product description 34" Foil Number Balloons – Blue, Rose Gold, Pink, Silver Create bold birthday and party decorations with our premium 34-inch foil number balloons. They’re reusable, easy to inflate with air or helium, and give a shiny, photo-ready look for happy celebrations, anniversaries and baby showers. 34" Large Size: Big, eye-catching numbers for backdrops and photos. Quality Foil: Durable mylar material with glossy metallic finish. Air or Helium: Self-sealing valve for simple inflation and deflation. Reusable: Gently deflate after use and store flat for the next party. Colour Options: Blue, Rose Gold, Pink, Silver (select the variant you need). Inflation Tips : Fill slowly and stop when the seams are smooth. Do not overfill. For helium use, attach a suitable weight. Instructions (from packaging) Inflate the balloon. Attach a non-metallic ribbon. Anchor the balloon with a suitable weight. Caution (from packaging) This balloon may conduct electricity. Do not release outdoors. Do not release near overhead power lines. Misuse may cause personal injury. Use with weights. Never use metallic ribbon with balloon. Dispose of responsibly. To keep your balloon properly inflated avoid exposure to extreme temperatures; in cold air the balloon will deflate slightly; exposure to warm air will restore proper inflation. Excessive heat could cause the balloon to burst. Warning (from packaging) Not suitable for children under 36 months – small parts. Please retain this packaging for future reference. What You Get : 1 x 34" foil number balloon in your chosen colour. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. Do not release outdoors or near power lines. Always use a non-metallic ribbon and suitable weight.
